title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Jack, Kaido, Beast Pirates as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Move away from them!!! Shutenmaru and Jack have...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the end... oko- bore town is going to be destroyed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there's no way a small fry like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: O-over there!!! Look at the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Why'd the sky change so suddenly?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's about to rain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, straw hat- ya! Get over here right now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A sudden turn of events! The boss has arrived!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 30 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
